title: Verify the full cancellation flow including all user nudges
description: Test the end-to-end cancellation flow where the user rejects the 'Loss Aversion' and 'Incentive' offers, successfully cancels, and sees a feedback pop-up.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 1. In the Trial Corner, click the 'Cancel Trial' button.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the secondary action to cancel.

expected_result: The user's trial is immediately cancelled. The Trial Corner and home widget update to a 'Cancelled' state. All content becomes locked. The feedback pop-up is displayed.
